notes: 🎮 private (midlane) was alive and ahead in lane — a shove-and-rotate there flips a 1-2 into a numbers advantage.
Willy Guggenheim (support) was alive and ahead in lane — a shove-and-rotate there flips a 1-2 into a numbers advantage.
You took Fangtooth in the same window — read it as a trade, not a clean loss.
🎮 private (midlane) was alive and ahead in lane — a shove-and-rotate there flips a 0-2 into a numbers advantage.
tabski (offlane) was alive and never joined — get them to the fight and the count changes.
You took Mini Prime in the same window — read it as a trade, not a clean loss.
Their main damage was Sparrow (17k physical); 1/5 of you itemized armor — that hurt.
Enemy ran 1/5 on or near their meta core — they were off-meta too, the win was there.

coaching.headline: A 20-minute objective win, +23 VP — you didn't out-carry them, you out-took every neutral on the map (Fangtooths and the Mini-Prime all yours, 28,117 objective damage to their 419).
coaching.team: This is the 3-stack winning the way you actually can: control the map. Every Fangtooth (min 9 and 16) and the Mini-Prime (min 17) came your way, you out-towered them 5-3, and the objective-damage gap was lopsided (28,117 vs 419). Xeebs' Khaimera anchored that with 18,352 damage to objectives and Willy's Steel frontlined (16,047 mitigated). Keep doing this — when the bot lane is even or behind, don't force fights, just keep stacking neutrals and structures.
coaching.whatShiftedIt: Itemize armor against the fed physical carry: their real damage was Sparrow's 17k physical, yet only 1 of 5 of you built armor — buy an early armor piece next time and that Sparrow doesn't go 8/0.

perPlayer.a0c393cc-1437-4bdc-8168-64676ce2166c: Drongo had a rough one — 0/3/5 with hero damage 31% under your norm (520 vs 758), and the enemy Sparrow hard-carried at 8/0/0. The matchup read favored (48.6%) so this lane was winnable — the team's objective control covered it. Next time, get an armor item early against that Sparrow and play safer until you spike.
perPlayer.10edbf65-457d-48d0-9151-9df5b4fcb40a: Steel did the frontline job — 5/3/1 and 16,047 damage mitigated, plus 4,025 into objectives to help the map snowball. Solid engage; just get one armor piece in against that Sparrow to make peeling the carry easier.
perPlayer.a412baf3-dd17-4f89-8ecf-9d0704f3a79e: Khaimera was the MVP of the objective game — 3/2/3 and a massive 18,352 damage to objectives into a favored jungle matchup (53.8%). Neutral control was the win condition here; keep prioritizing it exactly like this.

threats: Chain-CC risk (2 hard-CC abilities, ~2.0s of lockdown): Countess Feast (suppress 0.75s), Crunch Right Crunch (knockup 1.25s). Don't group tight into it — stagger the engage and hold mobility/cleanse for the key one.
Heal-stacking: Muriel. Anti-heal is mandatory against this comp — you brought none.
Dive threat on your backline: Countess, Crunch. Assign peel for your carry and ward your flanks.
synergy: Your engage/CC: Iggy & Scorch Inferno (knockback). Your kills come from landing burst INSIDE that CC window — whoever lands it, the rest must follow up immediately.
Strong AoE/teamfight kit — group at choke points and fight on top of objectives.

ourKits.combo: Soulfire waves → Mortal Coil pull-zone → Stupor orb → Abyssal Rift zone
ourKits.winCondition: zone a fight with Mortal Coil + ult and chunk from range
ourKits.passive: consumes essences from kills for power
ourKits.playWith: frontline to hold enemies in her zones
ourKits.playAgainst: fragile and reliant on her zones — flank/dive around the telegraphs

ourKits.combo: Oil Spill → Molotov ignite → Flame Turret → Inferno knockback ult
ourKits.winCondition: layer fire zones on a choke/objective and burn the team
ourKits.playWith: CC that holds enemies in his fire
ourKits.playAgainst: don't fight in his zones — flank; kill the turret, dive him

ourKits.combo: Old Rusty slow → Gag Grenade silence → Rad Rounds basics → Shrapnel Cannon armor shred
ourKits.winCondition: kite back, stack Wastelander bleed and Rad Rounds, melt from range
ourKits.playWith: peel and frontline so he can free-fire
ourKits.playAgainst: low mobility — dive him or break LoS through his poke; he folds to hard engage

ourKits.combo: Bull Rush knockback → Force Shield wall → Shield Slam knockup+stun ult, Shield Bash %hp
ourKits.winCondition: peel the carry with walls/knockups or engage with Shield Slam
ourKits.playWith: a carry he can wall for and peel
ourKits.playAgainst: his Force Shield blocks projectiles — reposition around it; bait Shield Slam

ourKits.combo: Ambush leap → Unleash AS → Cull stun, Invigorate to cleanse+heal
ourKits.winCondition: stick on one target, stun with Cull and out-sustain via Spirit Regen
ourKits.playWith: follow-up burst inside his Cull stun
ourKits.playAgainst: ANTI-HEAL is mandatory — it guts his whole kit; kite the leap and CC through Invigorate

enemyKits.combo: Alacrity shield+AS → Consecrated Ground bubble → Reversal global save
enemyKits.winCondition: keep the carry alive with global shields and enable their damage
enemyKits.passive: abilities grant Sentinel to allies; on-hit bonus
enemyKits.playAgainst: she has no damage threat — dive her carry through the shields or pick her first

enemyKits.combo: Shadow Slip in → Eventide → Blade Siphon → Feast suppress ult, Haemorrhage true-damage
enemyKits.winCondition: Feast-suppress a squishy and delete them with true-damage burst
enemyKits.passive: two-ability hits apply a %max-HP true-damage bleed
enemyKits.playWith: a team to clean up after her pick
enemyKits.playAgainst: Feast is her whole engage — bait it / peel; she's fragile, punish the recast window

enemyKits.combo: Forward Crunch gap-close stun → Right Crunch knockup → empowered Left Crunch, sustain via Re-Crunch
enemyKits.winCondition: all-in a squishy with the empowered combo and heal back through Re-Crunch
enemyKits.passive: post-ability empowered basic that refunds cooldowns
enemyKits.playWith: peel-stripping engage so he reaches the backline
enemyKits.playAgainst: peel/CC him off — without resets he's stranded; anti-heal blunts Re-Crunch

enemyKits.combo: Phantom Rush → Subjugate root → Siphon → Colossal Blow
enemyKits.winCondition: stack Souls to snowball Siphon and lock down with the root
enemyKits.passive: ability kills grant permanent Soul stacks (HP + damage)
enemyKits.playWith: a team that converts his root into kills
enemyKits.playAgainst: deny his last-hits early to starve Souls; dodge the slow Subjugate

enemyKits.combo: Piercing Shot poke → Heightened Senses AS → Hail of Arrows zone → Inner Fire ult
enemyKits.winCondition: ramp Relentless + AS and sustained-DPS the front down
enemyKits.playWith: heavy peel — she's immobile and pure DPS
enemyKits.playAgainst: she has zero escape — hard-engage her and she dies first
